name: Bank of America Corp.
h1: BofA, BoA's GCC footprint in India
lede: BofA, BoA runs six centers across six Indian cities. Gurugram, Hyderabad, Gandhinagar, New Delhi, Chennai and Mumbai, covering GBS, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BofA, BoA office in India. We map six, across six cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bank of America Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BofA, BoA runs 6 verified centers across 6 Indian cities (Gurugram, Hyderabad, Gandhinagar, New Delhi, Chennai, Mumbai), covering GBS. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: BofA, BoA's India footprint covers Gurugram, Hyderabad, Gandhinagar, New Delhi, Chennai and Mumbai, spanning GBS. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 310 decision-makers, in one profile.
